subcodes.first_line: O kind friend! Thy letter was received, and its soul-stirring contents brought joy and gladness to the hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان نامه مسطور وصول یافت و مضامین دلنشین سبب فرح و سرور قلوب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
